title: Reticus the bishop.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Reticius bishop of Autun, among the Aedui, had a great reputation in Gaul in the reign of Constantine.
I have read his commentaries On the Song of Songs and another great volume Against Novatian but besides these, I have found no works of his.
